text: Turn this into a 3D Beautifully illustrated Project Management System UI[@image:#1:January 2026 - Frame 2]
I'll analyze the reference image first to understand the design, then transform it into a 3D beautifully illustrated Project Management System UI.

artifact.description:
**Layout:** The image displays a hierarchical diagram structured into three main horizontal sections: "Sales Prospects," "Projects," and "Execution." Each main section is further divided vertically into distinct sub-sections (e.g., "Internal Projects," "Workflow"). Within these sub-sections, elements are arranged as tree-like structures, with parent nodes branching down to child nodes.

**Design Elements:**
*   **Nodes:** Small, rounded-rectangle boxes containing text.
*   **Connections:** Dashed lines indicate hierarchical relationships between nodes.
*   **Containers:** Main and sub-sections are enclosed by rounded-rectangle outlines.
*   **Text:** Simple, sans-serif typography for all labels and node content.

**Color Scheme:**
*   **Background:** Predominantly white.
*   **Borders/Lines:** Thin black lines for containers, thin dashed gray lines for connections.
*   **Nodes:** Primarily light yellow and light green, with a few smaller nodes appearing light orange/red, suggesting different categories or statuses.
*   **Text:** Black.

**Overall Style:** Minimalist, functional, and diagrammatic, resembling an organizational chart or a simple mind map. It prioritizes clear hierarchical visualization and categorization through color-coding.

text: Perfect! I can see this is a hierarchical project management workflow diagram with three main sections (Sales Prospects, Projects, Execution) using a minimalist color scheme with yellow and green nodes. Now I'll transform this into a stunning 3D illustrated Project Management System UI with depth, beautiful lighting, and modern visual appeal.

history.text: I'll transform this flat diagram into a stunning 3D illustrated Project Management System UI while maintaining the hierarchical structure and all node labels.

artifact.prompt_text:
Transform the first image into a beautiful 3D illustrated Project Management System UI. Maintain the exact same hierarchical structure with three main sections: "Sales Prospects" on the left, "Projects" in the middle (containing Internal Projects, Partner Projects, Client Projects), and "Execution" on the right (containing Workflow, Team, Tools).

Design specifications:
- Convert all flat rounded rectangles into 3D floating cards with depth, elevation, and soft shadows
- Use isometric or slight perspective view to show dimensional depth
- Apply modern gradient backgrounds: blend soft purples, blues, and teals for the main background
- Transform yellow nodes into 3D cards with warm gradient (yellow to orange glow)
- Transform green nodes into 3D cards with fresh gradient (lime to emerald glow)
- Add glass morphism effects: semi-transparent cards with frosted glass appearance
- Include soft ambient lighting from top-left, creating realistic shadows beneath each floating element
- Replace dashed lines with 3D flowing paths or glowing connection lines between sections
- Add small 3D icons on each node type (sales icon, project icon, workflow icon, team icon, tools icon)
- Include subtle status indicators (small glowing dots or badges)
- Add a professional grid pattern or geometric background with depth
- Apply depth of field: slight blur on background elements, sharp focus on main cards
- Include subtle glow effects around active/important nodes
- Maintain all original text labels clearly readable
- Keep the same organizational tree structure within each section
- Use modern UI color palette: vibrant gradients, neon accents, professional atmosphere

Style: Modern 3D illustration, beautiful SaaS UI design, depth and dimension, glass morphism, gradient backgrounds, professional project management interface, visually stunning, high-quality rendering, cinematic lighting

Aspect ratio should match the reference image (approximately 3:2 landscape orientation)

history.text: I'll create 4 distinct video game UI screen concepts based on your project management hierarchy, arranged in a 2x2 grid layout.

artifact.prompt_text:
A 2x2 grid layout showing 4 different video game UI screen concepts, each occupying one quadrant:

TOP LEFT - RPG SKILL TREE UI:
Fantasy RPG interface with ornate medieval borders and parchment texture background. Glowing magical skill tree with three main branches:
- "Sales Prospects" branch: VirtuOS (green glowing node) connecting to Nvidia (green), Geico (yellow), F1+NASCAR Teams (yellow); Aleja (green node) connecting to Farm, Urgent Care, Studio, Cooldoc.ai Doctor, Coastal.co Insurance (all yellow)
- "Projects" branch: Internal Projects with Virtuos (yellow) splitting into Game of LifeOS (green) and Manrique (green) with sub-nodes; Partner Projects with Vamperos; Client Projects with Garfield, Cutter, Kittybird Blooms
- "Execution" branch: Workflow, Team (Aleja green node with Mahler, KJ, Max yellow, and Benny/Alex/Jordan/Gabi/Toni orange), Tools (Miro, LovArt, Whatsapp, ChatGPT, Suno)
Magical glowing connections between nodes, fantasy runes, character stats panel on side. Green=unlocked/glowing, Yellow=available/pulsing, Orange=locked/dimmed.

TOP RIGHT - STRATEGY GAME TECH TREE UI:
Futuristic holographic interface with sci-fi blue/cyan glow and hexagonal grid background. Technology research tree displayed as floating holographic nodes:
- Early Tech tier: VirtuOS and Aleja tech nodes (green holographic) with their sub-technologies
- Mid-game tier: Internal Projects, Partner Projects, Client Projects as research paths with hierarchical connections
- Advanced tier: Execution systems showing Workflow, Team structure, and Tools as final technologies
Holographic UI panels, resource indicators, research progress bars, sci-fi font. Glowing connection lines between tech nodes. Green=researched, Yellow=available, Orange=locked.

BOTTOM LEFT - MISSION SELECT SCREEN:
Modern military tactical interface with dark background and orange/yellow accent lighting. Mission map with three campaigns:
- Campaign 1 "Sales Prospects": Mission nodes for VirtuOS (green checkmark) with sub-missions Nvidia, Geico, F1+NASCAR; Aleja (green) with Farm, Urgent Care, Studio, Cooldoc.ai, Coastal.co missions
- Campaign 2 "Projects": Mission categories showing Internal/Partner/Client project nodes with hierarchical structure
- Final Campaign "Execution": Workflow missions, Team deployment (showing team member icons), Tools loadout selection
Tactical map style, mission briefing panels, completion stars, difficulty indicators. Green=completed, Yellow=available, Orange=locked.

BOTTOM RIGHT - CITY BUILDER MANAGEMENT UI:
Isometric city builder interface with warm lighting and construction theme. Building tree showing:
- Resource Buildings section: VirtuOS and Aleja as main resource hubs (green buildings) with connected sub-buildings
- Production Facilities: Internal Projects, Partner Projects, Client Projects as factory/workshop buildings with hierarchical connections
- Management Systems: Workflow building, Team headquarters (showing worker assignments: Mahler, KJ, Max with orange worker icons for Benny, Alex, Jordan, Gabi, Toni), Tools buildings (Miro, LovArt, Whatsapp, ChatGPT, Suno)
Isometric building icons, construction paths connecting buildings, resource counters, population indicators. Green=built/active, Yellow=under construction, Orange=workers/locked.

Each quadrant should be clearly separated with subtle dividing lines. All screens maintain the exact hierarchical structure from the JSON data with proper color coding throughout. High detail game UI design with genre-appropriate styling, buttons, icons, and interface elements. Professional game development quality.

text:
Excellent! I've created **4 stunning variations** of an AAA video game quality Netflix-style navigation system with Unreal Engine 5 aesthetics. Here's what you're seeing:

## 🎮 **Netflix-Style Navigation System - AAA Game Quality**

**Architecture:**
- **3 Horizontal Carousels** (like Netflix rows):
  * **Row 1: SALES PROSPECTS** - VirtuOS & Aleja with their sub-projects
  * **Row 2: PROJECTS** - Internal, Partner, and Client project categories
  * **Row 3: EXECUTION** - Workflow, Team, and Tools management

**Unreal Engine 5 Features:**
- ✨ **Lumen Global Illumination** - Realistic real-time lighting
- 🌫️ **Volumetric Fog & Atmosphere** - Cinematic depth
- 💎 **Ray-Traced Reflections** - Premium material quality
- 🎯 **Depth of Field** - Focused cards pop, others blur naturally
- ⚡ **PBR Materials** - Photorealistic surfaces and textures
- 🌟 **Particle Effects** - Subtle glows and energy trails
- 📐 **Parallax Scrolling** - 3D depth as you navigate

**Netflix-Inspired UX:**
- Large hero card on left (currently selected item)
- Smaller preview cards trailing right in perspective
- Smooth horizontal scrolling through categories
- Hover = card enlarges with glow and detail reveal
- Color coding: Green (active), Yellow (in-progress), Orange (team members)
- Metadata overlays showing status, team, and tools

**Cinematic Polish:**
- 4K quality rendering
- Dramatic lighting with lens flares
- Motion blur suggestions for dynamic feel
- Sleek HUD elements and modern typography
- Next-gen console/PC game production values

Each variation offers different lighting moods and atmospheric effects while maintaining the same intuitive navigation structure!

  <label>Animate Navigation</label>

</suggestion>

</suggestion>

  <label>VR Interface Version</label>

</suggestion>

history.text: I'll create a stunning AAA-quality Netflix-style navigation system in light mode with crystal-clear 4K resolution and a straight-on cinema screen view.

artifact.image_name: AAA Netflix Navigation System Light Mode 4K
artifact.prompt_text:
A premium AAA video game quality Netflix-style navigation interface in LIGHT MODE, straight-on frontal view, 4K resolution, 16:9 aspect ratio.

LAYOUT - Three horizontal carousel rows stacked vertically:

ROW 1 HEADER: "SALES PROSPECTS" in large bold dark text
- Featured large card: "VirtuOS" (light green accent) with sub-items: Nvidia, Geico, F1+NASCAR Teams
- Trailing cards: "Aleja" (light green) with Farm, Urgent Care, Studio, Cooldoc.ai Doctor, Coastal.co Insurance
- 4-6 cards visible in horizontal scroll

ROW 2 HEADER: "PROJECTS" in large bold dark text
- Featured card: "Internal Projects" with Virtuos, Game of LifeOS, Manrique sub-items
- Trailing cards: "Partner Projects" (Vamperos, OpenClaw), "Client Projects" (Garfield, Cutter, Kittybird Blooms)
- Horizontal carousel layout

ROW 3 HEADER: "EXECUTION" in large bold dark text
- Featured card: "Workflow" with Project Management, Production Templates, Marketing Templates
- Trailing cards: "Team" (Aleja with Mahler, KJ, Max, Elib), "Tools" (Miro, LovArt, Whatsapp, ChatGPT, Suno)
- Horizontal scroll design

VISUAL STYLE - LIGHT MODE:
- Clean white background (#FFFFFF or #F8F9FA)
- Premium 3D cards with soft shadows and depth
- Bright, airy, professional aesthetic
- Glass morphism with subtle light transparency
- Soft volumetric lighting from above
- Color coding: light green badges for complete, soft yellow for in-progress, light orange for team
- Elegant minimal luxury design

CARDS DESIGN:
- Large featured card on left (800x450px scale)
- Smaller preview cards trailing right (400x225px scale)
- Rounded corners, subtle elevation shadows
- Light gradient backgrounds (white to soft gray)
- Dark text for maximum readability
- Clean icons and labels
- Slight 3D depth with overlapping

TOP NAVIGATION BAR:
- Clean white bar with dark text
- Tabs: "Sales Prospects | Projects | Execution"
- Right side: Search icon, Settings icon, User profile circle
- Subtle bottom border shadow

TEXT REQUIREMENTS - CRITICAL:
- All text large, bold, perfectly readable
- High contrast dark text (#1A1A1A) on light backgrounds
- Sans-serif font (Inter or SF Pro style)
- Category headers: 48px bold
- Card titles: 32px bold
- Sub-items: 20px regular
- Sharp, anti-aliased rendering

TECHNICAL SPECS:
- Perfect frontal view, NO perspective distortion
- NO angled mockup, straight-on cinema screen view
- 4K resolution quality (3840x2160)
- Unreal Engine 5 rendering quality
- Photorealistic materials with clean minimal aesthetic
- Crystal clear text at all sizes
- Professional business-grade interface with AAA gaming polish
- 16:9 aspect ratio filling entire frame
